name: Phasemod
description: Lurking in the low frequency end of Ringmod is a lovely subtle phaser. The Envelope and LFO give extra movement to the modulation.

name: 8ve 0 8
description: Ringmod's pitch tracking coupled with a square wave carrier gets you close to the OC-2 vibe, here with a little envelope pitch drop for an 808 flavour.

name: Space Invasion
description: Ringmod excels for all your sci-fi sfx needs!
